goals: Explore available unit conversion categories to understand what types of measurements can be converted
Get detailed information about length units for converting historical distances
Convert specific historical measurements to modern units for the history paper

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and methodical high school student working on a history research paper. Prefers to gather information systematically before making decisions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows basic unit types but unfamiliar with specific conversion formulas or tool names. Needs clear information to complete historical measurement conversions for academic work.

end_condition: The student has successfully converted the historical measurements needed for their history paper and has the modern equivalents.
